name: atmosphere surface temperature, humidity, wind, and pressure
fields: EXFatemp, EXFaqh, EXFewind, EXFnwind, EXFwspee, EXFpress
Introduction: This dataset provides 2D fields of atmosphere surface temperature, humidity, wind, and pressure interpolated to a regular 0.5-degree grid from the ECCO Version 4 Release 4 (V4r4) ocean and sea-ice state estimate. The dataset is provided on daily-average and monthly-average time resolution.
